business.name: Pro Plumbing Denver
hero.title: Denver's Trusted Plumbing Experts — Fast, Honest, Guaranteed
hero.subtitle: Burst pipe at 2am? Clogged drain ruining your evening? Our licensed plumbers arrive within 60 minutes with upfront pricing — no surprises, no overtime charges.
trustBar.title: Trusted by 4,200+ Homeowners
services.title: Residential & Commercial Plumbing
services.subtitle: Upfront flat-rate pricing — you approve the cost before we start. No hourly billing, no hidden fees.
services.items.leakDetection.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.items.leakDetection.description: Pinpoint hidden leaks behind walls, under slabs, and in ceilings using infrared cameras and acoustic sensors. We locate and fix the source — not just the symptom.
services.items.drainCleaning.title: Drain Cleaning & Unclogging
services.items.drainCleaning.description: Kitchen sink backing up? Shower draining slow? We clear tough blockages with hydro-jetting and mechanical snaking — camera inspection included.
services.items.waterHeater.title: Water Heater Install & Repair
services.items.waterHeater.description: Tank and tankless water heater installation, repair, and annual flushing. We service Rheem, AO Smith, Bradford White, Rinnai, and Navien.
services.items.pipeRepair.title: Pipe Repair & Repiping
services.items.pipeRepair.description: Burst pipe repair, copper repiping, PEX upgrades, and trenchless sewer line replacement. Same-day service available for emergencies.
services.items.emergency.title: 24/7 Emergency Plumbing
services.items.emergency.description: Flooding, burst pipes, sewer backups, and gas leaks — we dispatch a plumber within 60 minutes, any hour, any day. No weekend or holiday surcharges.
services.items.estimates.title: Free On-Site Estimates
services.items.estimates.description: Not sure what's wrong? We'll come to you, diagnose the issue, and give you a written estimate at no charge. Zero pressure, zero obligation.
process.title: 4 Simple Steps to a Fixed Pipe
process.subtitle: No runaround, no upselling — just straightforward plumbing service from call to completion.
process.steps.0.title: You Call or Book
process.steps.0.description: Call us or book online in 30 seconds. We confirm a 2-hour arrival window that works for you.
process.steps.1.title: We Diagnose On-Site
process.steps.1.description: A licensed plumber inspects the problem and gives you a flat-rate quote before touching any tools.
process.steps.2.title: We Fix It Right
process.steps.2.description: Once approved, we complete the repair using commercial-grade parts. Most jobs done same-day.
process.steps.3.title: 1-Year Warranty
process.steps.3.description: Every job backed by our 1-year labor warranty. If it leaks again, we fix it free.
galleryBA.title: Before & After
galleryBA.subtitle: Actual jobs completed by our team in the Denver metro area.
galleryBA.pairs.0.title: Kitchen Drain Line Replacement
galleryBA.pairs.0.description: Replaced corroded galvanized drain line with PVC — eliminated recurring backups for a Highlands Ranch family.
galleryBA.pairs.1.title: Bathroom Remodel Rough-In
galleryBA.pairs.1.description: Complete supply and drain rough-in for master bath renovation in Capitol Hill. PEX manifold system.
galleryBA.pairs.2.title: Tankless Water Heater Upgrade
galleryBA.pairs.2.description: Replaced 40-gallon tank with Rinnai RU199iN — endless hot water for a 4-bathroom Lakewood home.
serviceArea.title: Serving the Denver Metro Area
serviceArea.subtitle: Fast dispatch across all neighborhoods — most locations within 30 minutes.
testimonials.title: What Denver Homeowners Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from real customers — we never pay for fake reviews.
testimonials.items.0.author: James W. — Highlands Ranch
testimonials.items.0.text: Burst pipe in the basement at 1:30am. Called Pro Plumbing and Mike was at our door by 2:15. Had it fixed and dried up before the kids woke up. Fair price, no overtime gouge. These guys are the real deal.
testimonials.items.1.author: Sarah & Tom M. — Capitol Hill
testimonials.items.1.text: We've used them three times now — kitchen drain, water heater replacement, and a toilet rebuild. Always on time, always clean up after themselves. The flat-rate pricing is a huge relief.
testimonials.items.2.author: Robert K. — Lakewood
testimonials.items.2.text: Got quotes from 4 plumbers for a repipe. Pro Plumbing was the most transparent — showed me exactly what needed replacing and what didn't. Saved us about $3K vs the other bids. Outstanding work.
about.title: About Pro Plumbing Denver
about.story.title: 18 Years Under Denver Sinks
about.story.content: Pro Plumbing Denver started in 2008 when founder Mark Torres left a national franchise to do things the right way — honest diagnostics, flat-rate pricing, and no commission-driven upselling. Today we're a team of 12 licensed plumbers serving 300+ families a month across the Denver metro. Every plumber on our team carries a Colorado journeyman or master plumber license. We're fully bonded and insured, and we pull permits on every job that requires one. Our trucks carry $50K in parts so we can fix most problems in a single visit.
about.commitment.title: Our No-Surprise Guarantee
about.commitment.content: We quote flat rates before we start, use the parts we promised, and clean up when we're done. If our repair fails within one year, we come back and fix it free — parts and labor. We're also one of the few Denver plumbers offering a price-match guarantee: find a lower written quote for the same scope, and we'll beat it by 5%.
gallery.title: Recent Projects
gallery.subtitle: A sample of residential and commercial plumbing projects completed across the Denver metro.
gallery.items.0.title: Whole-Home PEX Repipe
gallery.items.0.description: Complete copper-to-PEX repipe for a 1972 ranch in Arvada. 2-day project, zero drywall damage.
gallery.items.1.title: Commercial Kitchen Plumbing
gallery.items.1.description: Grease trap, 3-compartment sink, and gas line for a new restaurant in RiNo District.
gallery.items.2.title: Sewer Line Replacement
gallery.items.2.description: Trenchless sewer replacement under driveway — Orangeburg to PVC, 62 feet, no excavation.
gallery.items.3.title: Tankless Water Heater Bank
gallery.items.3.description: Dual Rinnai tankless setup for a 6-bathroom custom home in Cherry Creek.
gallery.items.4.title: Bathroom Rough-In
gallery.items.4.description: Supply, drain, and vent rough-in for basement bathroom addition in Littleton.
gallery.items.5.title: Gas Line Installation
gallery.items.5.description: New gas line run for outdoor grill and fire pit — permitted and inspected, Highlands Ranch.
